| `maxContextChars` | int32 | NĂŁo | `32000` | Budget de contexto LLM |

#### WatchTargetSpec

| Campo | Tipo | ObrigatĂłrio | PadrĂŁo | DescriĂ§ĂŁo |
|-------|------|:-----------:|--------|-----------|
| `name` | string | **Sim*** | | Nome do recurso a monitorar (ex: `postgres`, `fluentd`) |
| `deployment` | string | NĂŁo | | Alias deprecated para `name` â mantido para compatibilidade |
| `kind` | string | NĂŁo | `Deployment` | Tipo do recurso: `Deployment`, `StatefulSet`, `DaemonSet`, `Job`, `CronJob` |
| `namespace` | string | **Sim** | | Namespace do recurso |
| `metricsPort` | int32 | NĂŁo | `0` | Porta Prometheus (0 = desabilitado) |
| `metricsPath` | string | NĂŁo | `/metrics` | Path do endpoint Prometheus |
| `metricsFilter` | []string | NĂŁo | | Filtros glob para mĂ©tricas |

Use `name` + `kind` para monitorar qualquer tipo de workload Kubernetes. Quando `kind` Ă© omitido, assume `Deployment`. O campo legado `deployment` ainda funciona como alias para `name`. Exemplos:
```yaml
targets:
  - name: api-gateway             # Deployment (kind padrĂŁo)
    namespace: production
  - name: postgres                # StatefulSet (banco de dados)
    kind: StatefulSet
    namespace: production
  - name: fluentd                 # DaemonSet (agente de logging)
    kind: DaemonSet
    namespace: logging
  - name: etl-pipeline            # CronJob (batch agendado)
    kind: CronJob
    namespace: data
```
O pipeline AIOps usarĂĄ automaticamente aĂ§Ă”es de remediaĂ§ĂŁo especĂ­ficas para cada tipo (ex: `ScaleStatefulSet`, `RestartDaemonSet`, `SuspendCronJob`) com base no kind detectado.

### Recursos Criados pelo Instance

| Recurso | Nome | DescriĂ§ĂŁo |
|---------|------|-----------|
| **Deployment** | `<name>` | Pods do servidor ChatCLI |
| **Service** | `<name>` | Service gRPC (headless automĂĄtico quando rĂ©plicas > 1 para LB client-side) |
| **ConfigMap** | `<name>` | VariĂĄveis de ambiente (provider, model, etc.) |
| **ConfigMap** | `<name>-watch-config` | YAML multi-target (se `targets` definido) |
| **ServiceAccount** | `<name>` | Identity para RBAC |
| **Role** | `<name>-watcher` | PermissĂ”es K8s do watcher (single-namespace) |
| **RoleBinding** | `<name>-watcher` | Binding da SA ao Role (single-namespace) |
| **ClusterRoleBinding** | `<namespace>-<name>-watcher` | Binding da SA Ă  ClusterRole compartilhada (multi-namespace) |
| **PVC** | `<name>-sessions` | PersistĂȘncia (se habilitada) |

### Balanceamento gRPC

O gRPC usa conexĂ”es HTTP/2 persistentes que fixam em um Ășnico pod via kube-proxy, deixando rĂ©plicas extras ociosas.

- **1 rĂ©plica** (padrĂŁo): Service ClusterIP padrĂŁo
- **MĂșltiplas rĂ©plicas**: Service headless (`ClusterIP: None`) Ă© criado automaticamente, habilitando round-robin client-side via resolver `dns:///` do gRPC
- **Keepalive**: WatcherBridge faz ping a cada 30s (timeout de 5s) para detectar pods inativos rapidamente. O servidor aceita pings com intervalo mĂ­nimo de 20s (`EnforcementPolicy.MinTime`)
- **TransiĂ§ĂŁo**: Ao escalar de 1 para 2+ rĂ©plicas (ou voltar), o operator deleta e recria o Service automaticamente (ClusterIP Ă© imutĂĄvel no Kubernetes)

### RBAC AutomĂĄtico

- **Same namespace** (todos os targets no mesmo namespace do Instance): Cria `Role` + `RoleBinding` por Instance
- **Cross-namespace** (targets em namespace diferente do Instance, ou em mĂșltiplos namespaces): Cria apenas `ClusterRoleBinding` por Instance, referenciando a `ClusterRole` compartilhada `chatcli-watcher` (prĂ©-provisionada pelo Helm chart / kustomize)
- Na deleĂ§ĂŁo do CR, o `ClusterRoleBinding` Ă© removido pelo finalizer; a `ClusterRole` compartilhada permanece (Ă© propriedade do release)

A partir da v1.155.0, o operator **nĂŁo cria mais `ClusterRole` em runtime** (hardening H5). As ClusterRoles compartilhadas â `chatcli-watcher` para o watcher e `chatcli-role-{viewer,operator,admin,superadmin}` para as platform roles â sĂŁo instaladas pelo Helm chart do operator. O ServiceAccount do operator tem o verb `bind` restrito a esses nomes especĂ­ficos via `resourceNames`, impedindo escalonamento de privilĂ©gio mesmo em caso de comprometimento.

**Upgrade a partir de v1.105.0**: clusters com Instances multi-namespace prĂ©-existentes tinham um `ClusterRoleBinding` apontando para uma ClusterRole por-Instance (formato antigo). Como `roleRef` Ă© imutĂĄvel no Kubernetes, um `helm upgrade` direto travava o reconcile com `cannot change roleRef`. A partir de v1.155.0, o operator detecta o `roleRef` divergente no inĂ­cio de `reconcileClusterRBAC`, deleta o CRB obsoleto e recria apontando para `chatcli-watcher` â migraĂ§ĂŁo transparente, sem intervenĂ§ĂŁo manual.

### Imagem do Servidor e Auto-ResoluĂ§ĂŁo

A tag da imagem do servidor (`spec.image.tag`) segue trĂȘs nĂ­veis de prioridade:

1. **Pin explĂ­cito** em `spec.image.tag` â honrado literalmente (GitOps-friendly).
2. **Omitido** â o operator resolve a partir do env var `CHATCLI_OPERATOR_APP_VERSION`, que o Helm chart injeta automaticamente a partir de `.Chart.AppVersion`. Efeito: `helm upgrade chatcli-operator` rola o servidor de todas as Instances que optaram por esse modo, sem patch manual.
3. **Fallback** â `latest` quando nenhum dos dois estĂĄ presente (ex.: `make deploy` sem Helm).

```yaml
apiVersion: platform.chatcli.io/v1alpha1
kind: Instance
metadata:
  name: chatcli-prod
spec:
  image:
    repository: ghcr.io/diillson/chatcli
    # tag omitido â herda appVersion do chart (recomendado p/ ambientes que atualizam via Helm)
  provider: CLAUDEAI
  model: claude-sonnet-4-6
  replicas: 2
```

Para ambientes que querem versionamento imutĂĄvel, continue pinando `spec.image.tag` e gerencie o upgrade manual. Para ambientes que querem "helm upgrade = upgrade completo", omita a tag.

### Auto-Rollout em MudanĂ§as de ConfiguraĂ§ĂŁo

O operator monitora mudanĂ§as em ConfigMaps e Secrets referenciados pelo Instance e dispara rolling updates automaticamente via hash annotations no PodTemplate:

| Annotation | Fonte | Quando Muda |
|------------|-------|-------------|
| `chatcli.io/watch-config-hash` | ConfigMap `<name>-watch-config` | Targets do watcher alterados |
| `chatcli.io/configmap-hash` | ConfigMap `<name>` | VariĂĄveis de ambiente atualizadas |
| `chatcli.io/secret-hash` | Secret referenciado em `apiKeys.name` | API keys criadas ou atualizadas |
| `chatcli.io/tls-hash` | Secret referenciado em `server.tls.secretName` | Certificados TLS renovados |

Adicionar/remover targets no `watcher.targets` e aplicar o Instance causa rollout automĂĄtico. Criar ou atualizar o Secret de API keys e renovar certificados TLS tambĂ©m disparam rollout automaticamente.

### ObservaĂ§ĂŁo de Secrets e ConfigMaps

O operator observa (`Watches`) Secrets no namespace do Instance. Quando um Secret referenciado em `apiKeys.name` ou `server.tls.secretName` Ă© criado ou atualizado, o reconciler Ă© acionado automaticamente â mesmo que o Secret nĂŁo existisse quando o Instance foi criado.

- **ConfigMap e Secret `envFrom`**: Marcados como `optional: true`, permitindo criar o Instance antes do Secret/ConfigMap
- **Ordem flexĂ­vel de deploy**: Namespace â Instance â Secret/ConfigMap (qualquer ordem apĂłs o namespace)

## CRDs da Plataforma AIOps

### Anomaly

Representa um sinal bruto detectado pelo WatcherBridge.

```yaml
apiVersion: platform.chatcli.io/v1alpha1
kind: Anomaly
metadata:
  name: watcher-highrestartcount-api-gateway-1234567890
  namespace: production
spec:
  signalType: pod_restart    # pod_restart | oom_kill | pod_not_ready | deploy_failing | error_rate | latency_spike
  source: watcher            # watcher | prometheus | manual
  severity: warning          # critical | high | medium | low | warning
  resource:
    kind: Deployment
    name: api-gateway
    namespace: production
  description: "HighRestartCount on api-gateway: container app restarted 8 times"
  detectedAt: "2026-02-16T10:30:00Z"
status:
  correlated: true
  issueRef:
    name: api-gateway-pod-restart-1771276354
```

#### Campos do Anomaly Spec

| Campo | Tipo | DescriĂ§ĂŁo |
|-------|------|-----------|
| `signalType` | AnomalySignalType | Tipo do sinal detectado |
| `source` | AnomalySource | Origem da detecĂ§ĂŁo (watcher, prometheus, manual) |
| `severity` | IssueSeverity | Severidade do sinal |
| `resource` | ResourceRef | Recurso K8s afetado (kind, name, namespace) |
| `description` | string | DescriĂ§ĂŁo legĂ­vel do problema |
| `detectedAt` | Time | Timestamp da detecĂ§ĂŁo |

#### Sinais Detectados (21 tipos)

**Sinais do Watcher:**

| AlertType (Server) | SignalType (Anomaly) | DescriĂ§ĂŁo |
|--------------------|---------------------|-----------|
| `HighRestartCount` | `pod_restart` | Pod com muitos restarts (CrashLoopBackOff) |
| `OOMKilled` | `oom_kill` | Container terminado por falta de memĂłria |
| `PodNotReady` | `pod_not_ready` | Pod nĂŁo estĂĄ no estado Ready |
| `DeploymentFailing` | `deploy_failing` | Deployment com Available=False |

**Sinais adicionais (via Prometheus, webhooks ou detecĂ§ĂŁo interna):**

| SignalType | DescriĂ§ĂŁo |
|-----------|-----------|
| `error_rate` | Taxa de erros HTTP elevada |
| `latency` | LatĂȘncia acima do threshold |
| `cpu_high` | Uso de CPU elevado |
| `memory_high` | Uso de memĂłria elevado |
| `disk_pressure` | Node com condiĂ§ĂŁo DiskPressure (disco cheio ou quase) |
| `node_not_ready` | Node com condiĂ§ĂŁo NotReady (kubelet sem resposta, falha de rede ou hardware) |
| `memory_pressure` | Node com condiĂ§ĂŁo MemoryPressure (memĂłria insuficiente para novos pods) |
| `pid_pressure` | Node com condiĂ§ĂŁo PIDPressure (processos excessivos, risco de fork bomb) |
| `network_unavailable` | Node com rede indisponĂ­vel (CNI falhou ou interface caiu) |
| `pvc_pending` | PVC em estado Pending |
| `ingress_error` | Erros no Ingress controller |
| `hpa_maxed` | HPA no mĂĄximo de rĂ©plicas |
| `job_failed` | Job falhou |
| `cronjob_missed` | CronJob nĂŁo executou no schedule |
| `certificate_expiring` | Certificado TLS expirando |
| `image_pull_error` | Erro ao puxar imagem do container |
| `crashloop_backoff` | Pod em CrashLoopBackOff |
| `helm_release_failed` | Helm release em estado failed |
| `argocd_degraded` | ArgoCD Application degradada |
| `config_drift` | Drift de configuraĂ§ĂŁo detectado |

#### Monitoramento de Nodes

O watcher monitora automaticamente a saude dos **nodes onde os pods dos targets estĂŁo rodando**. A cada ciclo de coleta, ele:

1. Identifica os nodes via label selector dos pods do target
2. Coleta as 5 condiĂ§Ă”es oficiais do Kubernetes: `Ready`, `DiskPressure`, `MemoryPressure`, `PIDPressure`, `NetworkUnavailable`
3. Coleta mĂ©tricas de CPU/memĂłria do node (via metrics server)
4. Conta pods ativos vs capacidade do node
5. Verifica se o node estĂĄ cordoned (unschedulable)

| CondiĂ§ĂŁo | Severidade | Signal | AĂ§ĂŁo disponĂ­vel |
|----------|:----------:|--------|-----------------|
| Node NotReady | CRITICAL | `node_not_ready` | `CordonNode`, `DrainNode` |
| DiskPressure | CRITICAL | `disk_pressure` | `CordonNode`, `DrainNode` |
| MemoryPressure | CRITICAL | `memory_high` | `CordonNode`, `DrainNode` |
| PIDPressure | WARNING | `node_not_ready` | `CordonNode` |
| NetworkUnavailable | CRITICAL | `node_not_ready` | `CordonNode`, `DrainNode` |
| Cordoned (Unschedulable) | WARNING | `node_not_ready` | Informativo |
| Pod capacity >90% | WARNING | `node_not_ready` | `CordonNode` |

As informaĂ§Ă”es de node sĂŁo incluidas no contexto enviado a IA para anĂĄlise, permitindo que a root cause seja correlacionada com problemas de infraestrutura (ex.: "OOMKill causado por MemoryPressure no node X").

title: Kubernetes Operator (AIOps)
content:
### Issue

Incidente correlacionado que agrupa anomalias e gerencia o ciclo de vida da remediaĂ§ĂŁo.

```yaml
apiVersion: platform.chatcli.io/v1alpha1
kind: Issue
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-pod-restart-1771276354
  namespace: production
spec:
  severity: high
  source: watcher
  signalType: pod_restart        # Propagated from Anomaly for tiered Runbook matching
  description: "Correlated incident: pod_restart on api-gateway"
  resource:
    kind: Deployment
    name: api-gateway
    namespace: production
  riskScore: 65
  correlatedAnomalies:
    - name: watcher-highrestartcount-api-gateway-1234567890
    - name: watcher-oomkilled-api-gateway-1234567891
status:
  state: Analyzing          # Detected | Analyzing | Remediating | Resolved | Escalated | Failed
  remediationAttempts: 0
  maxRemediationAttempts: 5  # default: 5, configurable via Instance aiops.maxRemediationAttempts
  detectedAt: "2026-02-16T10:30:00Z"
  conditions:
    - type: Analyzing
      status: "True"
      reason: AIInsightCreated
```

#### Estados do Issue

| Estado | DescriĂ§ĂŁo |
|--------|-----------|
| `Detected` | Issue recĂ©m-criado, aguardando anĂĄlise |
| `Analyzing` | AIInsight criado, aguardando resposta da IA (ou re-anĂĄlise com failure context) |
| `Remediating` | RemediationPlan em execuĂ§ĂŁo |
| `Resolved` | RemediaĂ§ĂŁo bem-sucedida (dedup invalidado para detecĂ§ĂŁo de recorrĂȘncia) |
| `Escalated` | Max tentativas atingido ou sem aĂ§Ă”es disponĂ­veis (dedup invalidado) |
| `Failed` | Falha terminal |

### AIInsight

AnĂĄlise de causa raiz gerada por IA com aĂ§Ă”es sugeridas para remediaĂ§ĂŁo automĂĄtica.

```yaml
apiVersion: platform.chatcli.io/v1alpha1
kind: AIInsight
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-pod-restart-1771276354-insight
  namespace: production
spec:
  issueRef:
    name: api-gateway-pod-restart-1771276354
  provider: CLAUDEAI
  model: claude-sonnet-4-6
status:
  analysis: "High restart count caused by OOMKilled. Container memory limit (512Mi) is insufficient for the current workload pattern."
  confidence: 0.87
  recommendations:
    - "Increase memory limit to 1Gi"
    - "Investigate possible memory leak in the application"
    - "Monitor GC pressure metrics"
  suggestedActions:
    - name: "Restart deployment"
      action: RestartDeployment
      description: "Restart pods to reclaim leaked memory immediately"
    - name: "Scale up replicas"
      action: ScaleDeployment
      description: "Add more replicas to distribute memory pressure"
      params:
        replicas: "4"
  generatedAt: "2026-02-16T10:31:00Z"
```

#### Campos do AIInsight Status

| Campo | Tipo | DescriĂ§ĂŁo |
|-------|------|-----------|
| `analysis` | string | AnĂĄlise de causa raiz gerada pela IA |
| `confidence` | float64 | NĂ­vel de confianĂ§a da anĂĄlise (0.0-1.0) |
| `recommendations` | []string | RecomendaĂ§Ă”es legiveis para humanos |
| `suggestedActions` | []SuggestedAction | AĂ§Ă”es estruturadas para remediaĂ§ĂŁo automĂĄtica |
| `generatedAt` | Time | Quando a anĂĄlise foi gerada |

#### SuggestedAction

| Campo | Tipo | DescriĂ§ĂŁo |
|-------|------|-----------|
| `name` | string | Nome legĂ­vel da aĂ§ĂŁo |
| `action` | string | Tipo da aĂ§ĂŁo (54 tipos disponĂ­veis â ver [Tipos de AĂ§ĂŁo](#tipos-de-aĂ§ĂŁo-54-tipos)) |
| `description` | string | ExplicaĂ§ĂŁo do motivo desta aĂ§ĂŁo |
| `params` | map[string]string | ParĂąmetros da aĂ§ĂŁo (ex: `replicas: "4"`) |

### RemediationPlan

Plano concreto de remediaĂ§ĂŁo gerado automaticamente a partir de Runbook ou aĂ§Ă”es da IA.

```yaml
apiVersion: platform.chatcli.io/v1alpha1
kind: RemediationPlan
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-pod-restart-1771276354-plan-1
  namespace: production
spec:
  issueRef:
    name: api-gateway-pod-restart-1771276354
  attempt: 1
  strategy: "Attempt 1 (AI-generated): High restart count caused by OOMKilled"
  actions:
    - type: RestartDeployment
    - type: ScaleDeployment
      params:
        replicas: "4"
  safetyConstraints:
    - "No delete operations"
    - "No destructive changes"
    - "Rollback on failure"
status:
  state: Completed           # Pending | Executing | Completed | Failed | RolledBack
  result: "Deployment restarted and scaled to 4 replicas successfully"
  startedAt: "2026-02-16T10:31:30Z"
  completedAt: "2026-02-16T10:32:15Z"
```

#### Rollback AutomĂĄtico e ProteĂ§ĂŁo de Estado

O operator implementa um **sistema de rollback automĂĄtico** que garante que remediaĂ§Ă”es malsucedidas nĂŁo deixem o cluster em estado pior do que antes. Antes de executar qualquer aĂ§ĂŁo, o estado completo do recurso Ă© capturado em um **snapshot estruturado restaurĂĄvel**.

    Antes da primeira aĂ§ĂŁo, o `RollbackEngine` captura um `ResourceSnapshot` estruturado com: replicas, imagens dos containers, CPU/memory requests e limits, estado do HPA (min/max replicas), e estado do node (schedulable/unschedulable). Funciona para **Deployments, StatefulSets, DaemonSets, Nodes e HPAs**.
  
    Em planos com mĂșltiplas aĂ§Ă”es, um `ActionCheckpoint` Ă© capturado **antes de cada aĂ§ĂŁo individual**. Isso permite saber exatamente qual aĂ§ĂŁo modificou o quĂȘ e em que ponto o plano falhou.
  
    Se qualquer aĂ§ĂŁo falha durante a execuĂ§ĂŁo, o operator **automaticamente restaura** o recurso para o estado do `PreflightSnapshot`. Replicas, imagens, resources requests/limits e estado do HPA sĂŁo revertidos. O plano transiciona para estado `RolledBack` (nĂŁo `Failed`).
  
    Se todas as aĂ§Ă”es executam com sucesso mas o recurso **nĂŁo fica healthy dentro de 90 segundos** (verification timeout), o operator tambĂ©m executa rollback automĂĄtico para o estado prĂ©-remediaĂ§ĂŁo.
  
    ApĂłs o rollback, o operator verifica se o recurso voltou ao estado healthy (`PostFailureHealthy`). Essa informaĂ§ĂŁo Ă© registrada no status do plano para auditoria e decisĂŁo sobre retry.
  
**O que Ă© capturado no snapshot:**

| Recurso | Campos Capturados |
|---------|-------------------|
| **Deployment** | replicas, container images, CPU/memory requests+limits, restart annotation |
| **StatefulSet** | replicas, container images, CPU/memory requests+limits |
| **DaemonSet** | container images, CPU/memory requests+limits |
| **Node** | schedulable state (para reverter cordon/drain) |
| **HPA** | minReplicas, maxReplicas |

**Exemplo de RemediationPlan com rollback executado:**

```yaml
apiVersion: platform.chatcli.io/v1alpha1
kind: RemediationPlan
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-plan-1
  namespace: production
status:
  state: RolledBack              # AĂ§ĂŁo falhou, rollback automĂĄtico executado
  result: "Action AdjustResources (index 1) failed: invalid memory_limit | Rollback: Rolled back production/api-gateway: replicas: 5 â 3; container app: memory_limit=1Gi | Post-rollback: resource healthy"
  rollbackPerformed: true
  rollbackResult: "Rolled back production/api-gateway: replicas: 5 â 3; container app: memory_limit=1Gi"
  postFailureHealthy: true       # Recurso voltou ao normal apĂłs rollback
  preflightSnapshot:
    resourceKind: Deployment
    resourceName: api-gateway
    namespace: production
    replicas: 3
    containerImages:
      app: "ghcr.io/myorg/api-gateway:v2.1.0"
    containerResources:
      app:
        cpuRequest: "200m"
        cpuLimit: "1000m"
        memoryRequest: "256Mi"
        memoryLimit: "512Mi"
    hpaMinReplicas: 2
    hpaMaxReplicas: 8
    capturedAt: "2026-02-16T10:31:00Z"
  actionCheckpoints:
    - actionIndex: 0
      actionType: ScaleDeployment
      success: true
      timestamp: "2026-02-16T10:31:05Z"
    - actionIndex: 1
      actionType: AdjustResources
      success: false
      timestamp: "2026-02-16T10:31:10Z"
  evidence:
    - type: preflight_snapshot
      data: "Structured snapshot captured: kind=Deployment replicas=3 containers=1"
      timestamp: "2026-02-16T10:31:00Z"
    - type: action_completed
      data: "Action ScaleDeployment executed successfully"
      timestamp: "2026-02-16T10:31:05Z"
    - type: action_failed
      data: "Action AdjustResources failed: invalid memory_limit format"
      timestamp: "2026-02-16T10:31:10Z"
    - type: rollback
      data: "Rolled back production/api-gateway: replicas: 5 â 3; container app: memory_limit=1Gi"
      timestamp: "2026-02-16T10:31:11Z"
```

O rollback automĂĄtico restaura o estado **anterior Ă  remediaĂ§ĂŁo**, nĂŁo resolve o problema original. ApĂłs o rollback, o IssueReconciler avalia se hĂĄ tentativas restantes e dispara **re-anĂĄlise com contexto de falha** â a IA recebe o que falhou e sugere uma estratĂ©gia diferente.

**Fluxo completo em caso de falha:**

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A[AĂ§ĂŁo Executada] -->|Falha| B[Rollback AutomĂĄtico]
    A -->|Sucesso| C[VerificaĂ§ĂŁo de SaĂșde 90s]
    C -->|Healthy| D[Completed â]
    C -->|Timeout Unhealthy| B
    B --> E{Rollback OK?}
    E -->|Sim| F[Estado: RolledBack]
    E -->|NĂŁo| G[Estado: Failed]
    F --> H{Tentativas restantes?}
    G --> H
    H -->|Sim| I[Re-anĂĄlise com failure context]
    H -->|NĂŁo| J[EscalaĂ§ĂŁo para humano]
    I --> K[IA sugere estratĂ©gia diferente]
    K --> A
```

**Campos de status adicionados ao RemediationPlan:**

| Campo | Tipo | DescriĂ§ĂŁo |
|-------|------|-----------|
| `preflightSnapshot` | ResourceSnapshot | Estado completo do recurso antes de qualquer aĂ§ĂŁo |
| `actionCheckpoints` | []ActionCheckpoint | Checkpoint antes de cada aĂ§ĂŁo com resultado (success/fail) |
| `rollbackPerformed` | bool | Se o rollback automĂĄtico foi executado |
| `rollbackResult` | string | DescriĂ§ĂŁo do que foi revertido (replicas, images, resources) |
| `postFailureHealthy` | *bool | Se o recurso estĂĄ healthy apĂłs rollback |

---

#### Tipos de AĂ§ĂŁo (54 tipos)

**Workload:**

| Tipo | DescriĂ§ĂŁo | ParĂąmetros |
|------|-----------|-----------|
| `ScaleDeployment` | Ajusta o nĂșmero de rĂ©plicas | `replicas` |
| `RestartDeployment` | Rollout restart do deployment | â |
| `RollbackDeployment` | Desfaz rollout (anterior, saudĂĄvel ou revisĂŁo especĂ­fica) | `toRevision` (optional: `previous`, `healthy`, ou nĂșmero) |
| `PatchConfig` | Atualiza chaves de um ConfigMap | `configmap`, `key=value` |
| `AdjustResources` | Ajusta CPU/memĂłria requests/limits de containers | `memory_limit`, `memory_request`, `cpu_limit`, `cpu_request`, `container` |
| `DeletePod` | Remove pod mais doente (CrashLoop > restarts) | `pod` (optional â auto-seleciona o mais doente) |
| `RestartStatefulSetPod` | Restart de pod StatefulSet (preserva identidade/storage) | `pod` (optional â omitir para rolling restart do StatefulSet inteiro) |

**GitOps:**

| Tipo | DescriĂ§ĂŁo | ParĂąmetros |
|------|-----------|-----------|
| `HelmRollback` | Rollback de Helm release para revisĂŁo anterior | `revision` (optional â padrĂŁo: anterior) |
| `ArgoSyncApp` | Trigger de sync em ArgoCD Application | `revision` (optional â padrĂŁo: HEAD) |

**Autoscaling:**

| Tipo | DescriĂ§ĂŁo | ParĂąmetros |
|------|-----------|-----------|
| `AdjustHPA` | Modifica min/max replicas ou target utilization do HPA | `minReplicas`, `maxReplicas`, `targetCPUUtilization` |

**Infraestrutura:**

| Tipo | DescriĂ§ĂŁo | ParĂąmetros |
|------|-----------|-----------|
| `CordonNode` | Marca node como unschedulable | `node` |
| `DrainNode` | Cordon + evict pods do node | `node` |

**Storage:**

| Tipo | DescriĂ§ĂŁo | ParĂąmetros |
|------|-----------|-----------|
| `ResizePVC` | Expande PVC (somente expansĂŁo, nĂŁo reduĂ§ĂŁo) | `pvc`, `size` (ex: `20Gi`) |

**Security:**

| Tipo | DescriĂ§ĂŁo | ParĂąmetros |
|------|-----------|-----------|
| `RotateSecret` | Atualiza valores de Secret ou copia de source | `secret`, `sourceSecret` ou `key=value` |

**Networking:**

| Tipo | DescriĂ§ĂŁo | ParĂąmetros |
|------|-----------|-----------|
| `UpdateIngress` | Modifica backend ou annotations de Ingress | `ingress`, `backendService`, `backendPort`, `annotation.*` |
| `PatchNetworkPolicy` | Adiciona portas permitidas a NetworkPolicy | `networkPolicy`, `allowPort`, `protocol` |

**Advanced:**

| Tipo | DescriĂ§ĂŁo | ParĂąmetros |
|------|-----------|-----------|
| `ApplyManifest` | Aplica manifesto JSON de um ConfigMap | `configmap`, `key` |
| `ExecDiagnostic` | Executa comando diagnĂłstico whitelisted em pod | `command` (string exata â ver [allowlist](#execdiagnostic-allowlist)) |
| `Custom` | AĂ§ĂŁo personalizada (bloqueada por safety checks) | â |

title: Kubernetes Operator (AIOps)
content:
#### ExecDiagnostic Allowlist

A aĂ§ĂŁo `ExecDiagnostic` faz match exato de string contra um allowlist de comandos read-only. Qualquer variaĂ§ĂŁo (flags diferentes, host alternativo, etc.) Ă© rejeitada com `command "..." not in approved diagnostic commands whitelist`.

**Comandos aprovados por padrĂŁo (~90):**

| Categoria | Comandos |
|-----------|----------|
| **Processo / shell** | `env`, `whoami`, `id`, `hostname`, `pwd`, `uname -a`, `uname -r`, `ps aux`, `ps -ef`, `top -b -n1` |
| **Filesystem / recursos** | `df -h`, `df -i`, `free -m`, `free -h`, `mount`, `uptime`, `ls -la /`, `ls -la /tmp`, `ls -la /var/log`, `du -sh /tmp`, `du -sh /var/log` |
| **Cgroups v2** (pod moderno) | `cat /sys/fs/cgroup/memory.max`, `memory.current`, `memory.events`, `memory.stat`, `cpu.max`, `cpu.stat` |
| **Cgroups v1** (pod legado) | `cat /sys/fs/cgroup/memory/memory.{limit_in_bytes,usage_in_bytes,oom_control,stat}`, `cat /sys/fs/cgroup/cpu/cpu.{cfs_quota_us,cfs_period_us,stat}` |
| **/proc introspection** | `cat /proc/1/{cgroup,status,limits,cmdline,environ}`, `cat /proc/{meminfo,cpuinfo,loadavg,version}`, `cat /proc/net/{tcp,udp,sockstat}` |
| **Rede (read-only)** | `netstat -tlnp`/`-an`/`-rn`, `ss -tlnp`/`-an`/`-s`, `ip addr`, `ip -s link`, `ip route`, `ip -6 route`, `ip neigh`, `ifconfig`, `arp -a` |
| **DNS / resolver** | `cat /etc/{hosts,resolv.conf,nsswitch.conf}`, `nslookup/getent/dig/host kubernetes.default.svc.cluster.local`, `nslookup kube-dns.kube-system.svc.cluster.local` |
| **Health / mĂ©tricas / pprof** | `curl -s localhost{,:8080}/{health,healthz,ready,readyz,live,livez}`, `curl -s localhost:{8080,8081,9090,9091}/metrics`, `curl -s localhost:9090/-/{ready,healthy}`, `curl -s localhost:6060/debug/pprof/{,goroutine,heap}?debug=1` |
| **Envoy / Istio sidecar** | `curl -s localhost:15000/ready`, `curl -s localhost:{15020,15021}/healthz/ready` |
| **wget fallback (Alpine)** | `wget -qO- http://localhost{,:8080}/{health,healthz,metrics}` |
| **Reachability TCP** | `nc -zv kubernetes.default.svc.cluster.local 443`, `nc -zv kube-dns.kube-system.svc.cluster.local 53` |

Extender via env var `CHATCLI_ALLOWED_DIAGNOSTIC_COMMANDS` (comma-separated, lido uma vez na inicializaĂ§ĂŁo):

```yaml
spec:
  extraEnv:
    - name: CHATCLI_ALLOWED_DIAGNOSTIC_COMMANDS
      value: "dig +short redis.default.svc.cluster.local, nc -zv redis.default.svc.cluster.local 6379"
```

Cada entrada Ă© matching exato. `nslookup <outro-host>` nĂŁo funciona â Ă© rejeitado. Se precisar de um host especĂ­fico, adicione a string completa ao env var.

A IA recebe esse allowlist no prompt de remediaĂ§ĂŁo (`server/handler_analysis.go`) e Ă© instruĂ­da a escolher o comando certo por sintoma: `memory.events` para OOM, `cpu.stat` para throttling, `getent/dig` para DNS, pprof para apps Go travadas, `nc -zv` para dependĂȘncia externa.

**StatefulSet:**

| Tipo | DescriĂ§ĂŁo | ParĂąmetros |
|------|-----------|------------|
| `ScaleStatefulSet` | Scaling ordenado de rĂ©plicas | `replicas` |
| `RestartStatefulSet` | Rolling restart via annotation | â |
| `RollbackStatefulSet` | Rollback via ControllerRevision | `toRevision` |
| `AdjustStatefulSetResources` | Ajusta CPU/memĂłria | `container`, `memory_limit`, `cpu_limit` |
| `DeleteStatefulSetPod` | Deleta pod especĂ­fico ou mais doente | `pod` (opcional) |
| `ForceDeleteStatefulSetPod` | Force-delete de pod preso (grace=0) | `pod` (OBRIGATĂRIO) |
| `UpdateStatefulSetStrategy` | Altera updateStrategy | `type`, `maxUnavailable` |
| `RecreateStatefulSetPVC` | Deleta PVC preso para recriaĂ§ĂŁo | `pvc`, `confirm=true` |
| `PartitionStatefulSetUpdate` | Partition para canary rollout | `partition` |

**DaemonSet:**

| Tipo | DescriĂ§ĂŁo | ParĂąmetros |
|------|-----------|------------|
| `RestartDaemonSet` | Rolling restart em todos os nodes | â |
| `RollbackDaemonSet` | Rollback via ControllerRevision | `toRevision` |
| `AdjustDaemonSetResources` | Ajusta CPU/memĂłria | `container`, `memory_limit`, `cpu_limit` |
| `DeleteDaemonSetPod` | Deleta pod (opcionalmente em node especĂ­fico) | `pod`, `node` (opcional) |
| `UpdateDaemonSetStrategy` | Altera estratĂ©gia de update | `type`, `maxUnavailable`, `maxSurge` |
| `PauseDaemonSetRollout` | Pausa rollout (maxUnavailable=0) | â |
| `CordonAndDeleteDaemonSetPod` | Cordona node + deleta pod | `node` (OBRIGATĂRIO) |

**Job:**

| Tipo | DescriĂ§ĂŁo | ParĂąmetros |
|------|-----------|------------|
| `RetryJob` | Deleta Job falhado + recria | â |
| `AdjustJobResources` | Ajusta CPU/memĂłria no template | `container`, `memory_limit`, `cpu_limit` |
| `DeleteFailedJob` | Limpa Job falhado | â |
| `SuspendJob` | Pausa Job (suspend=true) | â |
| `ResumeJob` | Retoma Job (suspend=false) | â |
| `AdjustJobParallelism` | Altera paralelismo | `parallelism` |
| `AdjustJobDeadline` | Altera deadline | `activeDeadlineSeconds` |
| `AdjustJobBackoffLimit` | Altera backoff limit | `backoffLimit` |
| `ForceDeleteJobPods` | Force-delete de todos os pods | â |

**CronJob:**

| Tipo | DescriĂ§ĂŁo | ParĂąmetros |
|------|-----------|------------|
| `SuspendCronJob` | Pausa agendamento | â |
| `ResumeCronJob` | Retoma agendamento | â |
| `TriggerCronJob` | Cria Job imediatamente | â |
| `AdjustCronJobResources` | Ajusta CPU/memĂłria no jobTemplate | `container`, `memory_limit`, `cpu_limit` |
| `AdjustCronJobSchedule` | Altera schedule | `schedule` |
| `AdjustCronJobDeadline` | Altera deadline | `startingDeadlineSeconds` |
| `AdjustCronJobHistory` | Altera limites de histĂłrico | `successfulJobsHistoryLimit`, `failedJobsHistoryLimit` |
| `AdjustCronJobConcurrency` | Altera polĂ­tica de concorrĂȘncia | `concurrencyPolicy` |
| `DeleteCronJobActiveJobs` | Mata Jobs ativos | â |
| `ReplaceCronJobTemplate` | Substitui template de ConfigMap | `configmap`, `key` |

#### Exemplos de RemediationPlan com Novas AĂ§Ă”es

    ```yaml
    apiVersion: platform.chatcli.io/v1alpha1
    kind: RemediationPlan
    metadata:
      name: checkout-helm-rollback-plan-1
      namespace: production
    spec:
      issueRef:
        name: checkout-helm-release-failed-123
      attempt: 1
      strategy: "Rollback Helm release to previous stable revision"
      actions:
        - type: HelmRollback
          params:
            revision: "41"    # revision especĂ­fica (omitir para anterior)
    ```
  
    ```yaml
    apiVersion: platform.chatcli.io/v1alpha1
    kind: RemediationPlan
    metadata:
      name: api-gateway-argo-sync-plan-1
      namespace: production
    spec:
      issueRef:
        name: api-gateway-argocd-degraded-456
      attempt: 1
      strategy: "Force ArgoCD sync to reconcile desired state"
      actions:
        - type: ArgoSyncApp
          params:
            revision: "abc123def"   # commit SHA (omitir para HEAD)
    ```
  
    ```yaml
    apiVersion: platform.chatcli.io/v1alpha1
    kind: RemediationPlan
    metadata:
      name: postgres-recovery-plan-1
      namespace: databases
    spec:
      issueRef:
        name: postgres-pod-restart-789
      attempt: 1
      strategy: "Restart unhealthy StatefulSet pod and adjust HPA"
      actions:
        - type: RestartStatefulSetPod
          params:
            pod: "postgres-2"   # pod especĂ­fico (omitir para rolling restart)
        - type: AdjustHPA
          params:
            minReplicas: "3"
            maxReplicas: "10"
            targetCPUUtilization: "70"
    ```
  
    ```yaml
    apiVersion: platform.chatcli.io/v1alpha1
    kind: RemediationPlan
    metadata:
      name: node-disk-pressure-plan-1
      namespace: kube-system
    spec:
      issueRef:
        name: node-disk-pressure-issue-321
      attempt: 1
      strategy: "Cordon and drain node with disk pressure"
      actions:
        - type: CordonNode
          params:
            node: "worker-node-03"
        - type: DrainNode
          params:
            node: "worker-node-03"
    ```
  
    ```yaml
    apiVersion: platform.chatcli.io/v1alpha1
    kind: RemediationPlan
    metadata:
      name: storage-and-certs-plan-1
      namespace: production
    spec:
      issueRef:
        name: pvc-full-cert-expired-555
      attempt: 1
      strategy: "Expand PVC and rotate expired certificate"
      actions:
        - type: ResizePVC
          params:
            pvc: "data-postgres-0"
            size: "50Gi"
        - type: RotateSecret
          params:
            secret: "tls-api-gateway"
            sourceSecret: "tls-api-gateway-renewed"
    ```
  
    ```yaml
    apiVersion: platform.chatcli.io/v1alpha1
    kind: RemediationPlan
    metadata:
      name: networking-fix-plan-1
      namespace: production
    spec:
      issueRef:
        name: ingress-backend-error-777
      attempt: 1
      strategy: "Fix ingress backend and open blocked port"
      actions:
        - type: UpdateIngress
          params:
            ingress: "api-gateway-ingress"
            backendService: "api-gateway-v2"
            backendPort: "8080"
        - type: PatchNetworkPolicy
          params:
            networkPolicy: "api-gateway-netpol"
            allowPort: "8443"
            protocol: "TCP"
    ```
  
    ```yaml
    apiVersion: platform.chatcli.io/v1alpha1
    kind: RemediationPlan
    metadata:
      name: advanced-fix-plan-1
      namespace: production
    spec:
      issueRef:
        name: complex-issue-999
      attempt: 1
      strategy: "Run diagnostics then apply fix manifest"
      actions:
        - type: ExecDiagnostic
          params:
            command: "df -h"
        - type: ApplyManifest
          params:
            configmap: "hotfix-configmap"
            key: "manifest.yaml"
    ```
  
### Runbook (Manual ou Auto-gerado)

Procedimentos operacionais. Runbooks **manuais** tĂȘm prioridade sobre tudo. Quando nĂŁo hĂĄ Runbook manual, a IA **gera automaticamente** um Runbook CR reutilizĂĄvel a partir das aĂ§Ă”es sugeridas.

    ```yaml
    apiVersion: platform.chatcli.io/v1alpha1
    kind: Runbook
    metadata:
      name: high-error-rate-deployment
      namespace: production
    spec:
      description: "Standard procedure for high error rate incidents on Deployments"
      trigger:
        signalType: error_rate
        severity: high
        resourceKind: Deployment
      steps:
        - name: Scale up
          action: ScaleDeployment
          description: "Increase replicas to absorb the error spike"
          params:
            replicas: "4"
        - name: Rollback
          action: RollbackDeployment
          description: "Revert to previous stable version if scaling doesn't help"
      maxAttempts: 3
    ```
  
    ```yaml
    apiVersion: platform.chatcli.io/v1alpha1
    kind: Runbook
    metadata:
      name: auto-pod-restart-high-deployment
      labels:
        platform.chatcli.io/auto-generated: "true"
        platform.chatcli.io/source-issue: "api-gateway-pod-restart-1771276354"
    spec:
      description: "Auto-generated: High restart count caused by OOMKilled..."
      trigger:
        signalType: pod_restart
        severity: high
        resourceKind: Deployment
      steps:
        - name: Restart deployment
          action: RestartDeployment
        - name: Scale up replicas
          action: ScaleDeployment
          params:
            replicas: "4"
      maxAttempts: 3
    ```

    Auto-generated Runbooks sĂŁo **reutilizados** para futuras Issues com o mesmo trigger, evitando chamadas desnecessĂĄrias ao LLM.
  
    ```yaml
    apiVersion: platform.chatcli.io/v1alpha1
    kind: Runbook
    metadata:
      name: helm-release-failed-runbook
      namespace: production
    spec:
      description: "Rollback de Helm release e sync ArgoCD apĂłs falha de deploy"
      trigger:
        signalType: helm_release_failed
        severity: critical
        resourceKind: Deployment
      steps:
        - name: Rollback Helm
          action: HelmRollback
          description: "Reverte para a revisĂŁo anterior estĂĄvel"
        - name: Sync ArgoCD
          action: ArgoSyncApp
          description: "ForĂ§a sync do ArgoCD para reconciliar estado"
      maxAttempts: 2
    ```
  
    ```yaml
    apiVersion: platform.chatcli.io/v1alpha1
    kind: Runbook
    metadata:
      name: statefulset-disk-full-runbook
      namespace: databases
    spec:
      description: "Expande PVC e reinicia pod StatefulSet com disco cheio"
      trigger:
        signalType: disk_pressure
        severity: high
        resourceKind: StatefulSet
      steps:
        - name: Expand storage
          action: ResizePVC
          description: "Dobra o tamanho do PVC"
          params:
            pvc: "data-postgres-0"
            size: "100Gi"
        - name: Restart pod
          action: RestartStatefulSetPod
          description: "Reinicia o pod para reconhecer o novo tamanho"
          params:
            pod: "postgres-0"
      maxAttempts: 2
    ```
  
### RemediationPlan (Agentic Mode)

Quando nĂŁo hĂĄ Runbook manual nem aĂ§Ă”es sugeridas pela IA, o operator cria um **plano agĂȘntico**. A IA atua como um agente com skills Kubernetes em um loop observe-decide-act:

```yaml
apiVersion: platform.chatcli.io/v1alpha1
kind: RemediationPlan
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-pod-restart-plan-1
  namespace: production
spec:
  issueRef:
    name: api-gateway-pod-restart-1771276354
  attempt: 1
  strategy: "Agentic AI remediation"
  agenticMode: true
  agenticMaxSteps: 10
  agenticHistory:
    - stepNumber: 1
      aiMessage: "High restart count with OOMKilled. Scaling up to reduce memory pressure."
      action:
        type: ScaleDeployment
        params:
          replicas: "5"
      observation: "SUCCESS: ScaleDeployment executed successfully"
    - stepNumber: 2
      aiMessage: "Pods still restarting. Adjusting memory limits."
      action:
        type: AdjustResources
        params:
          memory_limit: "1Gi"
          memory_request: "512Mi"
      observation: "SUCCESS: AdjustResources executed successfully"
    - stepNumber: 3
      aiMessage: "All pods running stable. Issue resolved."
status:
  state: Completed
  agenticStepCount: 3
  agenticStartedAt: "2026-02-16T10:31:00Z"
```

Safety Guards: Maximum of 10 steps (configurable via `agenticMaxSteps`), timeout of 10 minutes. If an action fails, the observation reports "FAILED: error" and the loop continues -- the AI receives the feedback and adapts.

**Na resoluĂ§ĂŁo agĂȘntica:** O operator gera automaticamente:
1. **PostMortem CR** com timeline, causa raiz, impacto, liĂ§Ă”es aprendidas
2. **Runbook CR** reutilizĂĄvel com os passos bem-sucedidos (label `source=agentic`)

title: Kubernetes Operator (AIOps)
content:
### PostMortem (Auto-generated)

RelatĂłrio de incidente gerado automaticamente apĂłs **qualquer resoluĂ§ĂŁo de remediaĂ§ĂŁo** (standard ou agĂȘntica). ContĂ©m o histĂłrico completo do incidente: detecĂ§ĂŁo, anĂĄlise, aĂ§Ă”es executadas, resoluĂ§ĂŁo, alĂ©m de **mĂ©tricas**, **correlaĂ§ĂŁo git**, **cascade chain**, **trending de incidentes recorrentes** e campo de **feedback do desenvolvedor**.

```yaml
apiVersion: platform.chatcli.io/v1alpha1
kind: PostMortem
metadata:
  name: pm-api-gateway-pod-restart-1771276354
  namespace: production
spec:
  issueRef:
    name: api-gateway-pod-restart-1771276354
  resource:
    kind: Deployment
    name: api-gateway
    namespace: production
  severity: high
status:
  state: Open              # Open | InReview | Closed
  summary: "OOMKilled containers caused cascading restarts on api-gateway"
  rootCause: "Memory limit (512Mi) insufficient for current workload pattern"
  impact: "Service degradation for 5 minutes, 30% error rate increase"
  timeline:
    - timestamp: "2026-02-16T10:30:00Z"
      type: detected
      detail: "Issue detected: pod_restart on api-gateway"
    - timestamp: "2026-02-16T10:31:00Z"
      type: action_executed
      detail: "ScaleDeployment to 5 replicas"
    - timestamp: "2026-02-16T10:31:35Z"
      type: action_executed
      detail: "AdjustResources memory_limit=1Gi"
    - timestamp: "2026-02-16T10:32:10Z"
      type: resolved
      detail: "All pods stable, issue resolved"
  lessonsLearned:
    - "Memory limits should account for peak workload patterns"
    - "Set up HPA to auto-scale on memory pressure"
  preventionActions:
    - "Configure HPA with min 3 replicas for api-gateway"
    - "Set memory limit to 1Gi across all environments"
  duration: "2m10s"
  generatedAt: "2026-02-16T10:32:10Z"
  # Novos campos de enrichment (preenchidos automaticamente pelo operator)
  metricSnapshots:
    - name: "memory_usage"
      value: "498000000"
      timestamp: "2026-02-16T10:30:00Z"
      phase: "during"
    - name: "memory_usage"
      value: "312000000"
      timestamp: "2026-02-16T10:35:00Z"
      phase: "after"
  blastRadius:
    - resource:
        kind: Service
        name: api-gateway-svc
        namespace: production
      impact: "5xx responses during pod restarts"
      severity: "high"
  gitCorrelation:
    commitSHA: "a1b2c3d4e5f6"
    commitMessage: "feat: add webhook handler for notifications"
    author: "dev@team.com"
    timestamp: "2026-02-16T09:15:00Z"
    confidence: 0.82
    filesChanged:
      - "internal/webhook/handler.go"
      - "internal/webhook/handler_test.go"
  trending:
    occurrenceCount: 3
    windowDays: 30
    relatedPostMortems:
      - "pm-api-gateway-oom-20260205"
      - "pm-api-gateway-oom-20260210"
    pattern: "Recurring oom_kill on Deployment/api-gateway (3 occurrences in 30 days)"
  gitOpsContext: "Helm release 'api-gateway' chart=api-gw version=2.1.0 status=deployed revision=15"
  logAnalysisSummary: "1 Go panic stack trace; 8 critical error patterns (resource/connectivity)"
  cascadeChain:
    - "production/api-gateway(root_cause)"
    - "production/frontend(victim)"
  # Feedback do dev (preenchido manualmente apĂłs revisĂŁo)
  feedback:
    overrideRootCause: ""          # vazio = concorda com a IA
    remediationAccuracy: 4         # 1-5 scale
    comments: "Boa anĂĄlise, mas poderia ter sugerido AdjustResources antes do restart"
    providedBy: "sre@team.com"
    providedAt: "2026-02-17T09:00:00Z"
```

#### Campos do PostMortem Status

| Campo | Tipo | DescriĂ§ĂŁo |
|-------|------|-----------|
| `state` | PostMortemState | Estado: Open, InReview, Closed |
| `summary` | string | Resumo do incidente gerado pela IA |
| `rootCause` | string | Causa raiz determinada pela IA |
| `impact` | string | Impacto do incidente |
| `timeline` | []TimelineEvent | Linha do tempo (detected, analyzed, action_executed, resolved) |
| `actionsExecuted` | []ActionRecord | AĂ§Ă”es executadas com resultado |
| `lessonsLearned` | []string | LiĂ§Ă”es aprendidas |
| `preventionActions` | []string | AĂ§Ă”es preventivas sugeridas |
| `duration` | string | DuraĂ§ĂŁo total do incidente |
| `generatedAt` | Time | Quando o PostMortem foi gerado |
| `reviewedAt` | Time | Quando o PostMortem foi revisado por humano |
| `metricSnapshots` | []MetricSnapshot | MĂ©tricas Prometheus capturadas antes/durante/depois do incidente |
| `blastRadius` | []BlastRadiusEntry | ServiĂ§os e recursos impactados pelo incidente |
| `gitCorrelation` | GitCorrelation | Commit suspeito correlacionado ao incidente (SHA, autor, arquivos, confianĂ§a) |
| `sliImpact` | string | Impacto nos SLIs e error budgets |
| `errorBudgetBurned` | float64 | Percentual de error budget consumido |
| `trending` | TrendingInfo | InformaĂ§ĂŁo de padrĂŁo recorrente (contagem, janela, PostMortems relacionados) |
| `feedback` | DevFeedback | Feedback humano (override de causa raiz, accuracy 1-5, comentĂĄrios) |
| `gitOpsContext` | string | Estado do Helm/ArgoCD/Flux no momento do incidente |
| `logAnalysisSummary` | string | Resumo dos achados da anĂĄlise de logs |
| `cascadeChain` | []string | Cadeia de cascade failure se aplicĂĄvel |

#### Matching de Runbooks (Tiered)

```text
Tier 1: SignalType + Severity + ResourceKind (match exato, preferido)
Tier 2: Severity + ResourceKind (fallback quando signal nĂŁo bate)
```

#### Prioridade de RemediaĂ§ĂŁo

```text
1. Runbook manual existente (match tiered)
2. Runbook auto-gerado pela IA (materializado como CR reutilizĂĄvel)
3. RemediaĂ§ĂŁo agĂȘntica por IA (loop observe-decide-act, gera PostMortem + Runbook)
4. Escalonamento (apenas quando agĂȘntico falha apĂłs max tentativas)
```

### SourceRepository (Code-Aware Diagnostics)

Vincula um workload Kubernetes ao seu repositĂłrio de cĂłdigo-fonte. Quando configurado, a IA recebe contexto de cĂłdigo durante anĂĄlise de incidentes: commits recentes correlacionados ao timestamp, trechos de cĂłdigo referenciados em stack traces, e arquivos de configuraĂ§ĂŁo (Dockerfile, values.yaml).

**ValidaĂ§ĂŁo de entrada (hardening):** `spec.url` aceita apenas as formas `https://`, `ssh://` ou `git@host:path`, e `spec.branch` Ă© restrito a `[A-Za-z0-9._/-]` sem `-` inicial â fechando o vetor de injeĂ§ĂŁo de argumento no git (ex.: `--upload-pack`). Leitura de trechos referenciados em stack traces Ă© confinada ao clone do repositĂłrio via `os.Root` (sem traversal nem escape por symlink). URLs ou branches fora do padrĂŁo fazem o sync falhar com erro explĂ­cito no status.

    ```yaml
    apiVersion: platform.chatcli.io/v1alpha1
    kind: SourceRepository
    metadata:
      name: api-gateway-repo
      namespace: production
    spec:
      url: "https://github.com/myorg/api-gateway.git"
      branch: main
      authType: token
      secretRef: git-token       # Secret com key "token"
      resource:
        kind: Deployment
        name: api-gateway
        namespace: production
      paths: ["cmd/", "internal/"]
      dockerfile: "Dockerfile"
      language: "Go"
      syncIntervalMinutes: 30
    ---
    apiVersion: v1
    kind: Secret
    metadata:
      name: git-token
      namespace: production
    type: Opaque
    stringData:
      token: "ghp_xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx"
    ```
  
    ```yaml
    apiVersion: platform.chatcli.io/v1alpha1
    kind: SourceRepository
    metadata:
      name: payment-service-repo
      namespace: production
    spec:
      url: "git@github.com:myorg/payment-service.git"
      branch: main
      authType: ssh
      secretRef: git-ssh-key     # Secret com key "ssh-key"
      resource:
        kind: Deployment
        name: payment-service
        namespace: production
      language: "Java"
    ---
    apiVersion: v1
    kind: Secret
    metadata:
      name: git-ssh-key
      namespace: production
    type: Opaque
    data:
      ssh-key: <base64-encoded-private-key>
    ```
  
    ```yaml
    apiVersion: platform.chatcli.io/v1alpha1
    kind: SourceRepository
    metadata:
      name: worker-repo
      namespace: batch
    spec:
      url: "https://gitlab.internal.com/team/worker.git"
      branch: develop
      authType: basic
      secretRef: git-basic-auth  # Secret com keys "username" e "password"
      resource:
        kind: Deployment
        name: worker
        namespace: batch
      paths: ["src/"]
      language: "Python"
    ---
    apiVersion: v1
    kind: Secret
    metadata:
      name: git-basic-auth
      namespace: batch
    type: Opaque
    stringData:
      username: "deploy-bot"
      password: "xxxxxxxxxxxx"
    ```
  
    ```yaml
    apiVersion: platform.chatcli.io/v1alpha1
    kind: SourceRepository
    metadata:
      name: oss-frontend-repo
      namespace: staging
    spec:
      url: "https://github.com/myorg/frontend.git"
      branch: main
      authType: none             # repo pĂșblico, sem auth
      resource:
        kind: Deployment
        name: frontend
        namespace: staging
      paths: ["src/", "pages/"]
      language: "TypeScript"
      syncIntervalMinutes: 60    # sync menos frequente para staging
    ```
  
    ```yaml
    apiVersion: platform.chatcli.io/v1alpha1
    kind: SourceRepository
    metadata:
      name: postgres-migrations-repo
      namespace: databases
    spec:
      url: "https://github.com/myorg/db-migrations.git"
      branch: main
      authType: token
      secretRef: git-token
      resource:
        kind: StatefulSet         # funciona com qualquer resource kind
        name: postgres
        namespace: databases
      paths: ["migrations/", "schemas/"]
      dockerfile: "Dockerfile.migrate"
    ```
  
**O que o operator faz com o SourceRepository:**

1. **Clone shallow** do repositĂłrio (depth 50) e sync periĂłdico (configurĂĄvel via `syncIntervalMinutes`)
2. **Indexa** linguagens detectadas, entrypoints (main.go, app.py, index.ts, etc.), config files (Dockerfile, values.yaml, Chart.yaml)
3. **CorrelaĂ§ĂŁo temporal**: encontra commits nos 30 min antes do incidente
4. **Commit suspeito**: identifica o commit mais provĂĄvel de ter causado o problema (score por proximidade temporal + volume de mudanĂ§as)
5. **ExtraĂ§ĂŁo de cĂłdigo**: quando stack traces referenciam arquivos (ex: `handler.go:42`), extrai trechos com contexto de 5 linhas antes/depois
6. **Feed para IA**: todo o contexto Ă© incluĂ­do no prompt de anĂĄlise

O repositĂłrio Ă© clonado localmente no operator pod. Para repos privados, crie um Secret com a chave correspondente ao `authType` escolhido e referencie em `secretRef`. O operator suporta repos **HTTPS** (token/basic) e **SSH** (ssh-key).

---

## Correlation Engine

O motor de correlaĂ§ĂŁo agrupa anomalias em issues usando:

### Risk Scoring

Cada tipo de sinal tem um peso:

| Sinal | Peso |
|-------|------|
| `oom_kill` | 30 |
| `error_rate` | 25 |
| `deploy_failing` | 25 |
| `latency_spike` | 20 |
| `pod_restart` | 20 |
| `pod_not_ready` | 20 |

O risk score Ă© a soma dos pesos das anomalias correlacionadas (mĂĄximo 100).

### ClassificaĂ§ĂŁo de Severidade

| Risk Score | Severidade |
|-----------|-----------|
| >= 80 | Critical |
| >= 60 | High |
| >= 40 | Medium |
| < 40 | Low |

### Agrupamento

- Anomalias no **mesmo recurso** (deployment + namespace) dentro da **mesma janela temporal** sĂŁo agrupadas no mesmo Issue
- **Incident ID** deterministico: hash do recurso + tipo de sinal (evita duplicatas)

## WatcherBridge

O `WatcherBridge` e o componente que conecta o servidor ChatCLI ao operator:

- **Polling**: Consulta `GetAlerts` do servidor a cada 30 segundos
- **Descoberta**: Localiza o servidor via Instance CRs (primeiro Instance com endpoint gRPC pronto)
- **Dedup**: Hash SHA256 do tipo+deployment+namespace (sem componente temporal â um problema contĂ­nuo gera apenas uma Anomaly). TTL de 2 horas
- **InvalidaĂ§ĂŁo de dedup**: Quando Issue atinge estado terminal (Resolved/Escalated), entradas de dedup para o recurso sĂŁo removidas, permitindo detecĂ§ĂŁo imediata de recorrĂȘncia
- **Poda**: Remove hashes expirados automaticamente (> 2h)
- **CriaĂ§ĂŁo**: Converte alertas em Anomaly CRs com nomes K8s vĂĄlidos

## Exemplos de Uso

    ```yaml
    apiVersion: platform.chatcli.io/v1alpha1
    kind: Instance
    metadata:
      name: chatcli-simple
    spec:
      provider: OPENAI
      apiKeys:
        name: chatcli-api-keys
    ```
  
    ```yaml
    apiVersion: platform.chatcli.io/v1alpha1
    kind: Instance
    metadata:
      name: chatcli-aiops
    spec:
      provider: CLAUDEAI
      apiKeys:
        name: chatcli-api-keys
      server:
        port: 50051
      watcher:
        enabled: true
        interval: "15s"
        maxContextChars: 32000
        targets:
          - deployment: api-gateway
            namespace: production
            metricsPort: 9090
            metricsFilter: ["http_*", "grpc_*"]
          - deployment: auth-service
            namespace: production
            metricsPort: 9090
          - deployment: worker
            namespace: batch
          - deployment: ml-inference
            namespace: ml
            metricsPort: 8080
      resources:
        requests:
          cpu: 200m
          memory: 256Mi
        limits:
          cpu: "1"
          memory: 1Gi
      persistence:
        enabled: true
        size: 5Gi
    ```
  
    ```yaml
    apiVersion: platform.chatcli.io/v1alpha1
    kind: Instance
    metadata:
      name: chatcli-resilient
      namespace: chatcli-system
    spec:
      provider: OPENAI
      model: gpt-4o
      fallback:
        enabled: true
        providers:
          - name: CLAUDEAI
            model: claude-sonnet-4-20250514
          - name: GOOGLEAI
            model: gemini-2.0-flash
        maxRetries: 2
        cooldownBase: "30s"
        cooldownMax: "5m"
      apiKeys:
        name: chatcli-api-keys
      watcher:
        enabled: true
        targets:
          - deployment: api-gateway
            namespace: production
    ---
    # Secret com keys de TODOS os providers do fallback
    apiVersion: v1
    kind: Secret
    metadata:
      name: chatcli-api-keys
      namespace: chatcli-system
    type: Opaque
    stringData:
      OPENAI_API_KEY: "sk-xxx"
      ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: "sk-ant-xxx"
      GOOGLEAI_API_KEY: "xxx"
    ```

    Quando o OpenAI falha (rate limit, timeout), o sistema tenta automaticamente Claude, depois Google AI. Cada provedor tem atĂ© 2 retentativas antes de ir para o prĂłximo. ApĂłs falha, o provedor entra em cooldown exponencial (30s â 1m â 2m â ... atĂ© 5m max).
  
    ```yaml
    apiVersion: platform.chatcli.io/v1alpha1
    kind: Runbook
    metadata:
      name: oom-kill-runbook
      namespace: production
    spec:
      description: "Procedure for OOMKilled containers"
      trigger:
        signalType: oom_kill
        severity: critical
        resourceKind: Deployment
      steps:
        - name: Restart pods
          action: RestartDeployment
          description: "Restart to reclaim leaked memory"
        - name: Scale up
          action: ScaleDeployment
          description: "Add replicas to distribute memory pressure"
          params:
            replicas: "5"
      maxAttempts: 2
    ```
  
    ```yaml
    apiVersion: v1
    kind: Secret
    metadata:
      name: chatcli-api-keys
    type: Opaque
    stringData:
      ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: "sk-ant-xxx"
      # OPENAI_API_KEY: "sk-xxx"
      # GOOGLEAI_API_KEY: "xxx"
    ```

title: Kubernetes Operator (AIOps)
content:
## Status e Monitoramento

    ```bash
    kubectl get instances
    ```
    ```text
    NAME            READY   REPLICAS   PROVIDER    AGE
    chatcli-aiops   true    1          CLAUDEAI    5m
    ```
  
    ```bash
    kubectl get issues -A
    ```
    ```text
    NAME                                    SEVERITY   STATE         RISK   AGE
    api-gateway-pod-restart-1771276354      high       Remediating   65     2m
    worker-oom-kill-3847291023              critical   Analyzing     90     30s
    ```
  
    ```bash
    kubectl get aiinsights -A
    ```
    ```text
    NAME                                           ISSUE                                   PROVIDER   CONFIDENCE   AGE
    api-gateway-pod-restart-1771276354-insight      api-gateway-pod-restart-1771276354      CLAUDEAI   0.87         1m
    ```
  
    ```bash
    kubectl get remediationplans -A
    ```
    ```text
    NAME                                          ISSUE                                   ATTEMPT   STATE       AGE
    api-gateway-pod-restart-1771276354-plan-1      api-gateway-pod-restart-1771276354      1         Completed   1m
    ```
  
    ```bash
    kubectl get postmortems -A
    ```
    ```text
    NAME                                          ISSUE                                   SEVERITY   STATE   AGE
    pm-api-gateway-pod-restart-1771276354         api-gateway-pod-restart-1771276354      high       Open    30s
    ```
  
    ```bash
    kubectl get anomalies -A
    ```
    ```text
    NAME                                               SIGNAL        SOURCE    SEVERITY   AGE
    watcher-highrestartcount-api-gateway-1234567890     pod_restart   watcher   warning    3m
    watcher-oomkilled-worker-9876543210                 oom_kill      watcher   critical   1m
    ```
  
## Desenvolvimento

```bash
cd operator

# Build
go build ./...

# Testes (130 funĂ§Ă”es de teste, 185 com subtests)
go test ./... -v

# Docker (deve ser construĂ­do a partir do root do repositĂłrio)
docker build -f operator/Dockerfile -t myregistry/chatcli-operator:dev .

# Deploy via Helm (recomendado)
helm install chatcli-operator ../deploy/helm/chatcli-operator/ \
  --namespace chatcli-system --create-namespace \
  --set image.repository=myregistry/chatcli-operator \
  --set image.tag=dev

# Ou deploy via kubectl (alternativa)
make deploy IMG=myregistry/chatcli-operator:dev
```

## SeguranĂ§a

O Operator implementa mĂșltiplas camadas de seguranĂ§a por padrĂŁo, seguindo o princĂ­pio de **fail-closed** (negar por padrĂŁo):

### AutenticaĂ§ĂŁo da REST API

A API REST opera em modo **fail-closed** por padrĂŁo -- nĂŁo hĂĄ modo dev sem autenticaĂ§ĂŁo. Toda requisiĂ§ĂŁo deve incluir um header `X-API-Key` vĂĄlido com role mapeada (viewer/operator/admin).

As API keys sĂŁo carregadas com a seguinte ordem de prioridade e recarregadas automaticamente a cada 30 segundos:

1. **Secret** `chatcli-operator-secrets` (prioridade) â campo `api-keys` com lista YAML `{key, role, description}`
2. **ConfigMap** `chatcli-operator-config` (fallback) â mesmo campo `api-keys`
3. Rejeita a requisiĂ§ĂŁo (ou aceita em dev-mode se `CHATCLI_OPERATOR_DEV_MODE=true`)

**Dois Secrets distintos no projeto** â nĂŁo confunda com as LLM keys do servidor (`chatcli-api-keys` consumido pelo chatcli server via `Instance.spec.apiKeys.name`). Tabela comparativa em [SeguranĂ§a â AutenticaĂ§ĂŁo](/pt/features/security#auten%C3%A7%C3%A3o-do-operator).

O Secret `chatcli-operator-secrets` precisa estar **no mesmo namespace que o pod do operator** (o controller resolve via `POD_NAMESPACE` env / arquivo do ServiceAccount, com fallback `chatcli-system`). Se vocĂȘ fez `helm install --namespace `, crie o Secret em ``.

AlteraĂ§Ă”es nas API keys -- tanto no Secret quanto no ConfigMap -- sĂŁo detectadas automaticamente a cada 30s. Nenhum restart do operator Ă© necessĂĄrio.

### Allowlist de Tipos de Recurso

O Operator classifica tipos de recurso Kubernetes em duas categorias:

    Pods, Deployments, StatefulSets, DaemonSets, Services, ConfigMaps, Ingresses, Jobs, CronJobs, ReplicaSets, Endpoints, PersistentVolumeClaims, HorizontalPodAutoscalers, NetworkPolicies, ServiceAccounts, Namespaces, Events.
  
    Secrets, ClusterRoles, ClusterRoleBindings, Roles, RoleBindings, CustomResourceDefinitions, MutatingWebhookConfigurations, ValidatingWebhookConfigurations, PodSecurityPolicies, Nodes, PersistentVolumes, StorageClasses, CSIDrivers, CSINodes, VolumeAttachments, CertificateSigningRequests, TokenReviews, SubjectAccessReviews.
  
### Scrubbing de Logs

Antes de enviar logs de aplicaĂ§ĂŁo ao LLM para anĂĄlise, o Operator remove **18 padrĂ”es sensĂ­veis**, incluindo:
- Tokens JWT/Bearer, API keys, senhas
- EndereĂ§os de e-mail, IPs internos, URLs com credenciais
- NĂșmeros de cartĂŁo de crĂ©dito, SSNs, certificados PEM

### TLS e RBAC

- **TLS 1.3** obrigatĂłrio em todas as conexĂ”es do servidor ChatCLI
- **ClusterRoles** com privilĂ©gio mĂ­nimo (read-only por padrĂŁo)
- **NetworkPolicy** configurĂĄvel para restringir trĂĄfego de rede ao namespace do Operator
- **Hardening H5 â RBAC sem escalonamento em runtime**: o operator nunca cria ou altera `ClusterRole`/`ClusterRoleBinding` em runtime. As ClusterRoles compartilhadas (`chatcli-watcher`, `chatcli-role-*`) sĂŁo prĂ©-provisionadas pelo Helm chart, e o SA do operator tem o verb `bind` restrito a esses nomes via `resourceNames`. Um operator comprometido nĂŁo consegue referenciar uma ClusterRole mais privilegiada em um novo `ClusterRoleBinding`.

### Auditoria

- **AuditEvent CRD** para trilha de auditoria imutĂĄvel (append-only)
- Logs estruturados com Request ID para correlaĂ§ĂŁo
- IntegraĂ§ĂŁo com `CHATCLI_AUDIT_LOG_PATH` via `extraEnv`

```yaml
spec:
  extraEnv:
    - name: CHATCLI_AGENT_SECURITY_MODE
      value: "strict"
    - name: CHATCLI_AUDIT_LOG_PATH
      value: "/var/log/chatcli/audit.jsonl"
```

Em modo `strict`, o agent security bloqueia qualquer operaĂ§ĂŁo de escrita no cluster que nĂŁo esteja na allowlist. Isso Ă© recomendado para ambientes de produĂ§ĂŁo.

## PrĂłximo Passo

    Deep-dive na arquitetura AIOps
  
    Detalhes de coleta e budget
  
    RPCs GetAlerts e AnalyzeIssue
  
    Receita: Monitoramento K8s com IA

title: Monitoramento Kubernetes (K8s Watcher)
content:
# Monitoramento Kubernetes (K8s Watcher)

O **K8s Watcher** permite que o ChatCLI monitore **mĂșltiplos deployments simultaneamente**, coletando mĂ©tricas de infra e aplicaĂ§ĂŁo, logs, eventos e status de pods. O contexto Ă© automaticamente injetado nos prompts do LLM com **gestĂŁo inteligente de budget** para nĂŁo estourar a janela de contexto.

## Arquitetura

    ```text
    ChatCLI -> ResourceWatcher -> 6 Collectors -> ObservabilityStore -> Summarizer -> LLM
    ```
  
    ```text
                            |-> ResourceWatcher[0] -> Store[0] --|
    ChatCLI -> MultiWatcher-|-> ResourceWatcher[1] -> Store[1] --|-> MultiSummarizer -> LLM
                            +-> ResourceWatcher[N] -> Store[N] --+   (budget-controlled)
    ```
  
Cada `ResourceWatcher` possui seus prĂłprios collectors (incluindo `PrometheusCollector` opcional) e todos compartilham **um Ășnico clientset Kubernetes**, minimizando conexĂ”es.

## Modos de Uso

    ```bash
    # Deployment (padrĂŁo)
    chatcli watch --deployment myapp --namespace production

    # StatefulSet
    chatcli watch --deployment postgres --kind StatefulSet --namespace production

    # DaemonSet
    chatcli watch --deployment fluentd --kind DaemonSet --namespace logging

    # CronJob
    chatcli watch --deployment etl-pipeline --kind CronJob --namespace data

    # One-shot com prompt
    chatcli watch --deployment myapp -p "O deployment estĂĄ saudĂĄvel?"
    ```
  
    ```bash
    chatcli watch --config targets.yaml
    chatcli watch --config targets.yaml -p "Quais deployments precisam de atenĂ§ĂŁo?"
    ```
  
    ```bash
    # Multi-target
    chatcli server --watch-config targets.yaml

    # Single-target (legado)
    chatcli server --watch-deployment myapp --watch-namespace production
    ```

    Clientes conectados via `chatcli connect` recebem o contexto K8s automaticamente.
  
## Arquivo de ConfiguraĂ§ĂŁo Multi-Target

```yaml
# targets.yaml
interval: "30s"           # Intervalo de coleta
window: "2h"              # Janela temporal de dados mantidos
maxLogLines: 100          # Linhas de log por pod por ciclo
maxContextChars: 32000     # Budget mĂĄximo de caracteres para contexto LLM

targets:
  - deployment: api-gateway                                  # Deployment (kind padrĂŁo)
    namespace: production
    metricsPort: 9090                                        # Porta Prometheus
    metricsFilter: ["http_requests_total", "http_request_duration_*"]

  - deployment: auth-service
    namespace: production
    metricsPort: 9090

  - deployment: worker
    namespace: batch
    # Sem metricsPort = Prometheus desabilitado para este target

  - deployment: postgres                                     # StatefulSet (banco de dados)
    kind: StatefulSet
    namespace: production

  - deployment: fluentd                                      # DaemonSet (logging)
    kind: DaemonSet
    namespace: logging

  - deployment: etl-pipeline                                 # CronJob (batch agendado)
    kind: CronJob
    namespace: data
```

### Campos do Target

| Campo | DescriĂ§ĂŁo | ObrigatĂłrio |
|-------|-----------|:-----------:|
| `deployment` | Nome do recurso a monitorar | Sim |
| `kind` | Tipo do recurso: `Deployment`, `StatefulSet`, `DaemonSet`, `Job`, `CronJob` (padrĂŁo: `Deployment`) | NĂŁo |
| `namespace` | Namespace (padrĂŁo: `default`) | NĂŁo |
| `metricsPort` | Porta do endpoint Prometheus (0 = desabilitado) | NĂŁo |
| `metricsPath` | Path HTTP das mĂ©tricas (padrĂŁo: `/metrics`) | NĂŁo |
| `metricsFilter` | Filtros glob para mĂ©tricas (vazio = todas) | NĂŁo |

## Flags Completas

### `chatcli watch`

| Flag | DescriĂ§ĂŁo | PadrĂŁo | Env Var |
|------|-----------|--------|---------|
| `--config` | Arquivo YAML multi-target | | |
| `--deployment` | Nome do recurso a monitorar | | `CHATCLI_WATCH_DEPLOYMENT` |
| `--kind` | Tipo do recurso: `Deployment`, `StatefulSet`, `DaemonSet`, `Job`, `CronJob` | `Deployment` | |
| `--namespace` | Namespace do recurso | `default` | `CHATCLI_WATCH_NAMESPACE` |
| `--interval` | Intervalo entre coletas | `30s` | `CHATCLI_WATCH_INTERVAL` |
| `--window` | Janela temporal de dados | `2h` | `CHATCLI_WATCH_WINDOW` |
| `--max-log-lines` | Linhas de log por pod | `100` | `CHATCLI_WATCH_MAX_LOG_LINES` |
| `--kubeconfig` | Caminho do kubeconfig | Auto-detectado | `CHATCLI_KUBECONFIG` |
| `--provider` | Provedor de LLM | `.env` | `LLM_PROVIDER` |
| `--model` | Modelo de LLM | `.env` | |
| `-p <prompt>` | One-shot: envia e sai | | |
| `--max-tokens` | Limite de tokens na resposta | | |

### `chatcli server` (flags do watcher)

| Flag | DescriĂ§ĂŁo | PadrĂŁo | Env Var |
|------|-----------|--------|---------|
| `--watch-config` | Arquivo YAML multi-target | | `CHATCLI_WATCH_CONFIG` |
| `--watch-deployment` | Deployment Ășnico (legado) | | `CHATCLI_WATCH_DEPLOYMENT` |
| `--watch-namespace` | Namespace | `default` | `CHATCLI_WATCH_NAMESPACE` |
| `--watch-interval` | Intervalo de coleta | `30s` | `CHATCLI_WATCH_INTERVAL` |
| `--watch-window` | Janela de observaĂ§ĂŁo | `2h` | `CHATCLI_WATCH_WINDOW` |
| `--watch-max-log-lines` | Max linhas de log | `100` | `CHATCLI_WATCH_MAX_LOG_LINES` |
| `--watch-kubeconfig` | Caminho do kubeconfig | Auto-detectado | `CHATCLI_KUBECONFIG` |

## O que e Coletado

### Collectors por Target

| Collector | Dados Coletados |
|-----------|----------------|
| **Deployment** | Replicas (ready/available/updated), strategy, conditions |
| **Pod Status** | Fase, readiness, restarts, termination info, container status |
| **Events** | Eventos K8s (Warning/Normal), mensagem, razao, timestamp |
| **Logs** | Ultimas N linhas por container por pod |
| **Metrics** | CPU e memĂłria por pod (via metrics-server) |
| **HPA** | Min/max replicas, mĂ©tricas atuais, replicas desejadas |
| **Prometheus** | MĂ©tricas de aplicaĂ§ĂŁo do endpoint `/metrics` dos pods |
| **Node Health** | CondiĂ§Ă”es do node (Ready, DiskPressure, MemoryPressure, PIDPressure, NetworkUnavailable), cordoned, CPU/mem usage, pod count vs capacity, versĂŁo kubelet |

### Node Health Collector

O `NodeCollector` monitora automaticamente a saude dos nodes onde os pods do target estĂŁo rodando:

1. **Descobre nodes** â via label selector dos pods do target, identifica em quais nodes eles estĂŁo schedulados
2. **Coleta condiĂ§Ă”es** â todas as 5 condiĂ§Ă”es oficiais do Kubernetes (`Ready`, `DiskPressure`, `MemoryPressure`, `PIDPressure`, `NetworkUnavailable`)
3. **Coleta mĂ©tricas** â CPU e memĂłria do node via metrics-server (quando disponĂ­vel)
4. **Pod capacity** â conta pods ativos vs capacidade mĂĄxima do node
5. **Cordoned** â detecta nodes marcados como `unschedulable`

**Alertas emitidos:**

| CondiĂ§ĂŁo | Severidade | Exemplo de mensagem |
|----------|:----------:|---------------------|
| NotReady | CRITICAL | `Node worker-1 is NotReady` |
| DiskPressure | CRITICAL | `Node worker-1 has DiskPressure` |
| MemoryPressure | CRITICAL | `Node worker-1 has MemoryPressure` |
| PIDPressure | WARNING | `Node worker-1 has PIDPressure` |
| NetworkUnavailable | CRITICAL | `Node worker-1 has NetworkUnavailable` |
| Cordoned | WARNING | `Node worker-1 is cordoned (unschedulable)` |
| Pod capacity >90% | WARNING | `Node worker-1 pod capacity at 95/110 (>90%)` |

O contexto do node e incluido no summary enviado ao LLM, permitindo que a IA correlacione problemas de pod com infraestrutura:

```
## Nodes (2)
  - worker-1: Ready cpu=1200m/4 mem=3Gi/8Gi pods=45/110 k8s=v1.31.4
  - worker-2: NOT READY [MemoryPressure] cpu=3800m/4 mem=7.8Gi/8Gi pods=98/110 k8s=v1.31.4
    MemoryPressure: kubelet has insufficient memory available
```

### Prometheus Collector (Novo)

O `PrometheusCollector` scrapa mĂ©tricas Prometheus diretamente dos pods:

- Descobre pods do deployment e seleciona **1 pod Ready**
- Faz HTTP GET em `http://podIP:port/path` (timeout: 5s)
- Parseia o formato Prometheus text exposition (stdlib, sem dependĂȘncias)
- Filtra por **glob patterns** configurados
- Ignora NaN, Inf e linhas de comentario

**Exemplos de filtros glob:**

```yaml
metricsFilter:
  - "http_requests_*"          # Todas as mĂ©tricas HTTP
  - "process_*"                # MĂ©tricas de processo
  - "go_goroutines"            # MĂ©trica especĂ­fica
  - "*_duration_seconds_*"     # Qualquer mĂ©trica de duraĂ§ĂŁo
```

## GestĂŁo de Budget de Contexto (MultiSummarizer)

Com mĂșltiplos targets, o **MultiSummarizer** garante que o contexto nĂŁo estoure a janela do LLM:

### Algoritmo

    `0 = healthy`, `1 = warning`, `2 = critical`
    - **Critical**: CrashLoopBackOff, OOMKilled, alerts criticos
    - **Warning**: replicas < desired, error logs, alerts warning
    - **Healthy**: tudo ok
  
    Critical primeiro, depois warning, depois healthy.
  
    - Score >= 1 -- contexto completo (~1-3 KB por target)
    - Score == 0 -- one-liner compacto (~80 chars por target)
  
    Comprime targets saudĂĄveis primeiro.
  
    Omite targets saudĂĄveis quando necessĂĄrio.
  
### Exemplo com 20 Targets (2 com problemas)

```text
[K8s Multi-Watcher: 20 targets monitored]

--- Targets Requiring Attention ---

[K8s Context: deployment/api-gateway in namespace/production]
Collected at: 2026-02-15T10:30:00Z

## Deployment Status
  Replicas: 2/3 ready, 3 updated, 2 available
  Strategy: RollingUpdate

## Pods (3 total)
  Total restarts: 12 (delta in window: 8)
  - api-gateway-abc12: Running [Ready] restarts=0 cpu=45m mem=128Mi
  - api-gateway-def34: Running [Ready] restarts=0 cpu=52m mem=135Mi
  - api-gateway-ghi56: Running [NOT READY] restarts=8 cpu=12m mem=95Mi
    Last terminated: OOMKilled (exit code 137) at 2026-02-15T10:28:00Z

## Application Metrics (4)
  http_request_duration_seconds_sum: 8453
  http_requests_total: 1.542e+06
  process_resident_memory_bytes: 1.34e+08
  go_goroutines: 245

## Active Alerts (2)
  [CRITICAL] CrashLoopBackOff: pod/api-gateway-ghi56
  [CRITICAL] OOMKilled: pod/api-gateway-ghi56

## Recent Error Logs (3)
  [10:27:45] api-gateway-ghi56/app: OutOfMemoryError: heap space
  [10:27:46] api-gateway-ghi56/app: Shutting down...
  [10:28:00] api-gateway-ghi56/app: Process exited with code 137

--- Healthy Targets ---
- production/auth-service: 3/3 pods ready | healthy | 0 alerts | 42 snapshots
- production/frontend: 2/2 pods ready | healthy | 0 alerts | 42 snapshots
- production/backend: 5/5 pods ready | healthy | 0 alerts | 42 snapshots
- batch/worker: 3/3 pods ready | healthy | 0 alerts | 42 snapshots
... (16 targets compactos)
```

**Budget total**: ~2 KB (detail) + 18 x 80 chars (compact) = ~3.5 KB, dentro do limite de 8 KB.

## DetecĂ§ĂŁo de Anomalias

| Anomalia | CondiĂ§ĂŁo | Severidade |
|----------|----------|------------|
| **CrashLoopBackOff** | Pod com mais de 5 restarts | Critical |
| **OOMKilled** | Container terminado por falta de memĂłria | Critical |
| **PodNotReady** | Pod nĂŁo estĂĄ no estado Ready | Warning |
| **DeploymentFailing** | Deployment com Available=False | Critical |

Os alertas sĂŁo incluidos no contexto enviado ao LLM e influenciam a **prioridade de budget** do MultiSummarizer.

## Observability Store

Os dados coletados sĂŁo armazenados em um **ring buffer** por target com janela temporal configurĂĄvel:

- **Snapshots**: Estado completo periodico (pods, deployment, HPA, events, metrics, app metrics)
- **Logs**: Logs recentes de cada pod com classificaĂ§ĂŁo (info/warning/error)
- **Alertas**: Anomalias detectadas com severidade e timestamps

### RotaĂ§ĂŁo AutomĂĄtica

Dados mais antigos que a janela temporal (`--window`) sĂŁo automaticamente descartados, mantendo o uso de memĂłria constante independente do nĂșmero de targets.

## Comando `/watch`

Dentro do ChatCLI interativo (local ou remoto), use `/watch` para ver o estado:

    ```text
    /watch
    K8s Watcher Active
      Deployment:  myapp
      Namespace:   production
      Snapshots:   42
      Pods:        3
      Alerts:      1
    ```
  
    ```text
    /watch
    K8s Multi-Watcher Active
      Watching 20 targets: 18 healthy, 1 warning, 1 critical
    ```
  
## One-Shot com Contexto K8s

```bash
# Deployment unico
chatcli watch --deployment myapp -p "O deployment estĂĄ saudĂĄvel?"

# Multi-target
chatcli watch --config targets.yaml -p "Resuma o status de todos os deployments"

# Via servidor remoto
chatcli connect meuservidor:50051 -p "Por que os pods estĂŁo reiniciando?"
```

## Exemplos de Perguntas

```text
> O deployment estĂĄ saudĂĄvel?
> Quais deployments precisam de atenĂ§ĂŁo?
> Por que o pod xyz estĂĄ reiniciando?
> AnĂĄlise as mĂ©tricas HTTP do api-gateway. O latency estĂĄ aceitĂĄvel?
> Compare o estado do auth-service com 30 minutos atrĂĄs
> Quais eventos de warning ocorreram na Ășltima hora?
> Baseado nas mĂ©tricas Prometheus, preciso escalar algum deployment?
> Resuma o status de todos os targets para um report de equipe
```

## Requisitos

- **Kubernetes Cluster**: Acesso via kubeconfig ou in-cluster config
- **PermissĂ”es RBAC**: Leitura de pods, eventos, logs, deployments, HPA, ingresses
- **metrics-server** (opcional): Para coleta de CPU/memĂłria
- **Prometheus endpoints** (opcional): Apps que expoe `/metrics` no formato Prometheus text

### RBAC

    ```yaml
    apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
    kind: Role
    metadata:
      name: chatcli-watcher
      namespace: production
    rules:
      - apiGroups: [""]
        resources: ["pods", "pods/log", "events", "services", "endpoints"]
        verbs: ["get", "list", "watch"]
      - apiGroups: ["apps"]
        resources: ["deployments", "replicasets", "statefulsets", "daemonsets"]
        verbs: ["get", "list", "watch"]
      - apiGroups: ["autoscaling"]
        resources: ["horizontalpodautoscalers"]
        verbs: ["get", "list", "watch"]
      - apiGroups: ["networking.k8s.io"]
        resources: ["ingresses"]
        verbs: ["get", "list"]
      - apiGroups: ["metrics.k8s.io"]
        resources: ["pods"]
        verbs: ["get", "list"]
    ```
  
    Quando os targets estĂŁo em namespaces diferentes, o Operator cria apenas um `ClusterRoleBinding` por Instance, referenciando a `ClusterRole` compartilhada `chatcli-watcher` que Ă© prĂ©-provisionada pelo Helm chart do operator (hardening H5 â ver [k8s-operator#tls-e-rbac](/pt/features/k8s-operator#tls-e-rbac)). As regras do `chatcli-watcher` sĂŁo as mesmas da Role acima, aplicadas cluster-wide.
  
## IntegraĂ§ĂŁo com AIOps

Os alertas do K8s Watcher alimentam automaticamente o **pipeline AIOps** do Operator. Quando o Operator detecta alertas via `GetAlerts` RPC, ele cria Anomaly CRs que sĂŁo correlacionados em Issues, analisados por IA e remediados automaticamente.

```text
Alertas detectados pelo Watcher -> Anomaly -> Issue -> AIInsight -> RemediationPlan -> ResoluĂ§ĂŁo
```

Veja [AIOps Platform](/pt/features/aiops-platform) para o fluxo completo.

A partir da v2 da plataforma AIOps, os alertas do Watcher tambĂ©m alimentam:
- **NotificationPolicy** para roteamento automĂĄtico para Slack, PagerDuty, OpsGenie, Email, Webhook e Teams
- **ApprovalPolicy** para gate de aprovaĂ§ĂŁo antes de remediaĂ§Ă”es em produĂ§ĂŁo
- **ServiceLevelObjective** para cĂĄlculo de burn rate e error budget
- **NoiseReducer** para supressĂŁo de alertas repetitivos, sazonais e flapping

Consulte a [documentaĂ§ĂŁo completa da AIOps Platform](/pt/features/aiops/notifications) para detalhes.

## PrĂłximo Passo

    Configurar o servidor com watcher
  
    K8s Operator (AIOps)
  
    AIOps Platform (deep-dive)
  
    Deploy no Kubernetes

title: Knowledge Base (RAG keyless)
content:
# Knowledge Base (RAG keyless)

Um corpus de documentaĂ§ĂŁo de **6MB** vira **~1,5M de tokens** se anexado inteiro â estoura a janela de qualquer modelo no primeiro turno. O modo `knowledge` do [`/context`](/pt/features/persistent-context) resolve com o mesmo padrĂŁo pull-first da [memĂłria persistente](/pt/features/bootstrap-memory): a conversa recebe sĂł um **index card** (o que a base cobre), e o conteĂșdo Ă© **recuperado sob demanda** â automaticamente a cada turno e, no agente, iterativamente via tool `@knowledge`.

```bash
# 1. Achate a doc (ex.: plugin @docs-flatten) â JSONL
@docs-flatten --repo https://github.com/org/docs.git --format jsonl --output docs.jsonl

# 2. Indexe como knowledge base (JSONL nativo; diretĂłrios tambĂ©m funcionam)
/context create minha-doc docs.jsonl --mode knowledge

# 3. Anexe â custo fixo de ~900 tokens/turno, com 6MB ou 60MB
/context attach minha-doc
```

| | Attach tradicional (`full`) | `--mode knowledge` |
|---|---|---|
| Custo no prompt | corpus inteiro (~1,5M tokens p/ 6MB) | **index card (~900 tokens, fixo)** |
| ConteĂșdo | empurrado de uma vez | **puxado por relevĂąncia, a cada turno** |
| API key | â | **nenhuma** (BM25 puro-Go; embeddings = boost opcional) |
| Conhecimento | truncado/estourado | Ă­ntegro, pesquisĂĄvel e citĂĄvel por `source` |

---

## Como funciona

### IngestĂŁo nativa do JSONL (docs-flatten)

Cada linha do JSONL vira um **documento virtual** preservando `source`, tĂ­tulo e proveniĂȘncia (`repoUrl`/`commit`) â em vez de entrar como um blob de texto Ășnico. Linhas malformadas sĂŁo contadas e puladas, nunca fatais. DiretĂłrios comuns tambĂ©m viram knowledge base (scanner normal, atĂ© 100MB).

O `@docs-flatten` aceita **trĂȘs fontes** para o mesmo JSONL: `root=<dir>` (pasta local), `repo=<git-url>` (clone raso) e `url=<site>` (crawl raso mesmo-domĂ­nio para docs que sĂł existem como site HTML, sem repo de Markdown).

### CĂłdigo e infraestrutura (`kind=code`)

AlĂ©m de documentaĂ§ĂŁo, o `@docs-flatten` ingere **repositĂłrios de cĂłdigo-fonte, Terraform e GitOps (Kubernetes/Argo)** â no mesmo schema JSONL, entĂŁo o knowledge mode nĂŁo muda nada do lado de baixo. O parĂąmetro `kind` controla o que entra e como Ă© fatiado:

| `kind` | O que ingere |
|---|---|
| `docs` (default) | SĂł Markdown/MDX. Comportamento legado â fluxos de doc existentes nunca passam a engolir cĂłdigo por acidente. |
| `code` | **TambĂ©m** cĂłdigo-fonte, Terraform, YAML Kubernetes/Argo e shell, fatiados **por estrutura** (funĂ§Ă”es, recursos, manifests) com tĂ­tulo de sĂ­mbolo/recurso. Ă o modo "aponte para um repo de app/infra/GitOps". |
| `auto` | Por arquivo: Markdown fica Markdown, cĂłdigo/config fatia por estrutura, outro texto vira janela. |

O **fatiamento Ă© agnĂłstico de linguagem** â nĂŁo depende de uma lista de palavras-chave por linguagem, entĂŁo nĂŁo quebra ao trocar de stack:

| Arquivos | Unidade de chunk | TĂ­tulo |
|---|---|---|
| `.go .java .kt .ts .rs .cs .cpp .swift .scala .php` âŠ | declaraĂ§ĂŁo de topo (balanĂ§o de chaves) | sĂ­mbolo (`HandleCheckout`, `OrderService`) |
| `.tf .tfvars .hcl` | bloco Terraform | `tipo.nome` (`aws_eks_cluster.main`) |
| `.yaml .yml` | documento (`---`) | `Kind/nome` (`Rollout/checkout-api`) |
| `.py .rb` | `def`/`class` de topo (indentaĂ§ĂŁo) | sĂ­mbolo |
| `.sh .bash` | funĂ§ĂŁo / bloco top-level | nome da funĂ§ĂŁo |
| qualquer outro texto | janela por tamanho | caminho do arquivo |

O tĂ­tulo Ă© **metadado best-effort**: se a heurĂ­stica nĂŁo reconhecer a linguagem, ele cai na linha de assinatura limpa â **o conteĂșdo Ă© sempre indexado e buscĂĄvel**, um tĂ­tulo perdido nunca custa recall. RuĂ­do Ă© pulado por default (`vendor/`, `node_modules/`, `.terraform/`, lockfiles, minificados, binĂĄrios) e arquivos acima de **1 MiB** sĂŁo ignorados.

```bash
# Uma base por camada â app, infra e gitops
@docs-flatten root=./app   kind=code format=jsonl output=app.jsonl
@docs-flatten root=./infra kind=code format=jsonl output=infra.jsonl   # blocos .tf
@docs-flatten root=./argo  kind=code format=jsonl output=argo.jsonl    # manifests .yaml
```
